name: The Goonies
description: The 1985 cult-classic adventure about a group of kids hunting pirate treasure in Oregon

questions.q: In what year was The Goonies released?

source.notes: Released June 7, 1985 — the date now celebrated as 'Goonies Day' in Astoria.

questions.q: Who directed The Goonies?

source.notes: Also directed Superman (1978) and Lethal Weapon (1987).

questions.q: In which Oregon town is The Goonies set and primarily filmed?

source.notes: The film's 'Goon Docks' neighborhood is a fictionalized version of Astoria.

questions.q: Who plays Mikey Walsh, the asthmatic leader of the Goonies?

source.notes: Later played Samwise Gamgee in The Lord of the Rings.

questions.q: Which future blockbuster star plays Mikey's older brother Brand?

source.notes: Later played Thanos in the Marvel Cinematic Universe.

questions.q: What is the name of the legendary pirate whose treasure the Goonies seek?

source.notes: A 17th-century Dutch pirate in the film's lore.

questions.q: Who provided the story for The Goonies?

source.notes: Also produced via Amblin Entertainment.

questions.q: What is the name of One-Eyed Willy's pirate ship?

source.notes: The full-scale ship prop was scrapped after filming.

questions.q: Which future Oscar-winning actor plays the gadget-loving Data?

source.notes: Won Best Supporting Actor for Everything Everywhere All at Once (2022).

questions.q: What is Chunk's real first name in the film?

source.notes: Played by Jeff Cohen; shares a surname with his character.

questions.q: Which actor plays Mouth, who translates for the Walshes' Spanish-speaking housekeeper?

source.notes: Also starred in Stand by Me the following year.

questions.q: Which pop singer performed 'The Goonies 'R' Good Enough' for the soundtrack?

source.notes: Made two music videos, both featuring the Goonies cast.

questions.q: What is the surname of the three-brother crime family who serve as the film's villains?

source.notes: 'Fratelli' means 'brothers' in Italian.

questions.q: Who plays the brutal matriarch of the villains, Mama Fratelli?

source.notes: Oscar-nominated the same year for Throw Momma from the Train.

questions.q: Who plays Francis Fratelli, later famous for The Matrix and Memento?

source.notes: Played Cypher in The Matrix and Teddy in Memento.

questions.q: Which iconic superhero's theme plays when Sloth reveals the shirt under his own?

source.notes: Sloth reveals a Superman T-shirt after freeing himself.

questions.q: Which NFL defensive end turned actor plays Sloth?

source.notes: A two-time Super Bowl winner with the Oakland Raiders.

questions.q: What iconic Oregon sea stack appears in the film's final scenes?

source.notes: 235-foot sea stack at Cannon Beach.

questions.q: Who wrote the screenplay for The Goonies, based on Spielberg's story?

source.notes: Later directed Home Alone and Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone.

questions.q: Which composer scored The Goonies, including the driving 'Fratelli Chase' theme?

source.notes: Won an Oscar for Best Original Score for The Milagro Beanfield War (1988).

questions.q: In what year was The Goonies selected for preservation in the U.S. National Film Registry?

source.notes: Selected for its cultural significance by the Library of Congress.

questions.q: What is the name of Chunk's signature dance move that earns him entry to Mikey's house?

source.notes: Performed by Jeff Cohen lifting his shirt at the front gate.
